current_judgment: Pipeline Audit keeps its forensic payload intact while adding an Explain layer that translates the same trace into user-readable reasoning.
key_evidence: WorkspaceTracePanel now has Explain, Overview, and Forensic modes, with Explain as the user-facing summary layer and Overview/Forensic preserved.
workspaceExplain.ts derives five explanation blocks from existing retrieval_trace and pipeline_trace instead of introducing a new backend payload contract.
Explain view groups the turn into four user-readable phases: question interpretation, evidence search, answer decision, and final evidence.
next_action: Run a live chat turn in test mode and verify the Explain wording against a few real OCP operator queries before broader chatbot testing.
